codeReview.summary: The mobile tokens package exports the required light/dark semantic and surface colors, typography/spacing/radius scales, and parity tests against DEFAULT_THEME and UI CSS. The implementation is straightforward and tests cover completeness and fallback behavior.

issues.description: DEFAULT_THEME is imported via a relative path into another package. This bypasses workspace dependency conventions and makes the package less portable; prefer importing from @craft-agent/shared/config with a declared workspace dependency.

The package does not declare a dependency on @craft-agent/shared even though it imports DEFAULT_THEME from that package. Add a workspace dependency to align with monorepo conventions and avoid hidden coupling.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The mobile-worker skill mandates tests live under __tests__, but existing mobile packages (e.g., mobile-contracts) place Bun tests alongside source files (src/index.test.ts). The guidance appears out-of-date for tokens packages.

summary: Reviewed the mobile-tokens package commit and verified required tokens and parity tests are present. No blocking issues found; noted non-blocking dependency/import convention concerns and a skill guidance mismatch about test locations.
